zone_name: Central-South Tram Corridor (Unique Tram Network Zone)

geography.data_source: KMC ward map 2022, CTC (Calcutta Tramways Company) route overlay mapping, tram corridor zone spans central-south Kolkata along tram tracks

demographics.data_source: Census 2011 Kolkata district tables (wards along tram corridor), stable to declining population at -0.1% CAGR

income_profile.data_source: NSSO 78th Round (2020-21) West Bengal urban tables, PLFS 2022-23, tram corridor area mixed employment patterns

commute_profile.data_source: CTC (Calcutta Tramways Company) ridership data 2023, UNIQUE: Kolkata is the only Indian city with operational tram network, tram as primary mode along corridor due to low fare and cultural affinity

sensitivity_parameters.data_source: Estimated from mid-lower income transit corridor, high sensitivity to tram route changes — tram removal would trigger extreme community response, Lokniti-CSDS 2024 West Bengal data

social_network_parameters.data_source: Estimated from tram corridor social patterns — daily tram commuters form strong weak-tie networks, para culture along corridor, tram as social space (unique to Kolkata)

informal_economy_nodes.data_source: Estimated from Rashbehari Avenue crossing commercial hub, tram stop area footfall
Estimated from Maidan area street vendor cluster, tram-stop vendors, park-edge vendors
Estimated from shops lining tram tracks — unique commercial pattern where shops face tram stops, transit-dependent footfall

tier1_agent_archetype_weights.data_source: Transit Hub/Mixed template from AGENT_SPEC.md, directly applicable — tram corridor is a linear transit hub with mixed income residential along the tracks

tier2_agent_types.data_source: Estimated from KMC ward councillors, CTC management, tram workers' union, market associations along corridor
